title: Angle Brackets 15PCS, L Bracket 30 x 30 x 38 x 1.2 mm, Stainless Steel Sleeper Brackets with 90 Screws, Heavy Duty Right Angle Corner Bracket for Wood, Metal Corner Braces for Fixing Timber
features: 15 Pcs Angle Brackets Set: Package includes 15 pcs 30mm x 30mm x 38mm x 1.2mm l shaped brackets and 90 pcs 1.6cm screws. Each l bracket has 6 holes (diameter: 5mm), so each corner bracket is equipped with 6 screws to fix the bracket to the wooden board

Stainless Steel Sleeper Brackets: These corner braces are made of 1.2mm thick high quality stainless steel that is strong, durable, rustproof and scratch resistant, and the smooth edges of these metal angle brackets will not hurt your hands

Right Angle & 6 Holes Design: These heavy duty angle brackets are designed with right angle and 6 holes. Its 90 degree design and multi holes design give these corner brackets a strong load-bearing capacity, so the right angle bracket is ideal for connecting furniture parts and strengthening the stability of wooden furniture

Easy to Install: These shelf brackets are very easy to install, and these equipped iron screws are used to mount the l brackets. First put a 90 degree bracket on two wooden boards or other suitable surface, and then use a screwdriver to drill 6 screws into the corresponding holes to connect two individual wooden boards

Versatile Angle Brackets for Wood: The metal brackets for wood can be used as railway sleepers brackets, shelf brackets, bed brackets, joist hangers and timber brackets for fixing and reinforcing cabinet, dresser, chair, drawer, table, window, bed, book shelf and other furniture
description: Product Description Gorffy Angle Brackets 15 Pcs, L Bracket 30 x 30 x 38 x 1.2mm, Stainless Steel Sleeper Brackets with 90 Screws Angle Brackets Making Home Better, Making Life Better Gorffy is a professional manufacturer of home supplies and we endeavor to provide you with premium products. Our aim is "making home better, making life better". Let's build your dream home together! Gorrfy 15 Pcs Angle Brackets Heavy Duty Right Angle Brackets These heavy duty angle brackets are designed with 90 degree and multi hole, which give the l shaped brackets good stability, and the 1.2mm thick sleeper brackets have a strong load-bearing capacity to support heavy items without shaking. Package Include: 15 pcs l bracket & 90 pcs screws Size of the Corner Brackets: 30mm x 30mm x 38mm Thickness of the Bracket: 1.2mm Diameter of the Hole: 4mm Size of the Screw: 16mm Strong and Durable These metal angle brackets are made of premium stainless steel that is strong, durable, rustproof, anti-corrosion and scratch resistant, and it smooth surface won't scratch your hands. Easy to Install Put the angle bracket on the wooden boards and place the screws on the corresponding holes. Use a screwdriver to tighten the screws (6 screws per corner bracket).
